description: One of eight equal parts, resonating with musical octaves and seasonal divisions. It represents the fine granularity possible while maintaining harmony with natural cycles.
rationale: The word 'hophi' echoes 'honu' (eight) in its initial 'ho'. The fricative 'phi' adds a refined, precise quality appropriate for this smaller division. This CV.FV pattern suggests both the breath of cycles and the precision of eightfold division.
